tasks.subject: C26 Task 1: Disk-util GraphQL field live probe
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Disambiguate the RunPod GraphQL runtime{} disk-util field name via trial selection sets against a real cheap pod; capture outcome in committed sidecar.

**Files:** Create tests/live/test_runpod_util_disk_probe.py, tests/live/_runpod_util_disk_probe.json; Modify docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-13-c26-runpod-util-aware-stall-classify-design.md

**Acceptance Criteria:** gated by KINOFORGE_LIVE_RUNPOD=1; sidecar JSON committed; spec §8+§16 amended; pod destroyed post-probe; spend ≤ $0.005.

**Verify:** KINOFORGE_LIVE_RUNPOD=1 pixi run pytest tests/live/test_runpod_util_disk_probe.py -v -s → PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/live/test_runpod_util_disk_probe.py", "tests/live/_runpod_util_disk_probe.json"], "verifyCommand": "KINOFORGE_LIVE_RUNPOD=1 pixi run pytest tests/live/test_runpod_util_disk_probe.py -v -s", "acceptanceCriteria": ["sidecar committed", "spec amended", "pod destroyed", "spend ≤ $0.005"]}
```

tasks.subject: C26 Task 2: UtilSnapshotEndpoint Protocol + UtilSnapshot dataclass + capability gate
tasks.description:

**Files:** Create src/kinoforge/core/util_endpoints.py, tests/core/test_util_endpoints.py

**Acceptance Criteria:** UtilSnapshot frozen dataclass with 5 Optional fields; UtilSnapshotEndpoint runtime-checkable Protocol; provider_util_supported gate seeded with local/runpod; core-import-ban preserved; 6/6 tests pass.

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/core/test_util_endpoints.py -v → 6 PASS


**Acceptance Criteria:** injectable http_post; single GraphQL query; MAX across gpus; data.pod=null → None; errors → TransportError; Bearer+UA headers; disk-field matches Task 1; 8/8 tests pass.

tasks.subject: C26 Task 7: classify() STALL_REAP + Verdict + DEFAULT_APPLY_POLICY
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Append STALL_REAP to Verdict; include in DEFAULT_APPLY_POLICY; extend classify() with row 3' intercepting LIVE.

**Files:** Modify src/kinoforge/core/reaper.py; Create tests/core/test_reaper_stall.py

**Acceptance Criteria:** STALL_REAP appended (additive); in DEFAULT_APPLY_POLICY; classify gains 3 new kwargs; row 3' honors per-entry stall_window_s override; legacy entries → LIVE; stall_window_s=None → LIVE; 9/9 new tests + reaper suite green.

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/core/test_reaper_stall.py tests/core/test_reaper.py -v → all PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/reaper.py", "tests/core/test_reaper_stall.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_reaper_stall.py tests/core/test_reaper.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["STALL_REAP appended additively", "in DEFAULT_APPLY_POLICY", "per-entry override honored", "legacy entries fall through", "9/9 tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: C26 Task 9: Cross-process consumer threading
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Thread 3 new classify() kwargs through 5 existing callsites (CLI _cmd_reap + _resolve_warm_instance + reaper_actor.sweep + act_on_verdict + sweeper).

**Files:** Modify src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py, src/kinoforge/core/reaper_actor.py, src/kinoforge/core/sweeper.py; tests for each.

**Acceptance Criteria:** all callsites thread kwargs; STALL_REAP outside _FORCE_BYPASSABLE; _cmd_reap --apply destroys stalled; kill-switch path unchanged; touched suites + lint green.

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/cli tests/core/test_reaper_actor.py tests/core/test_sweeper.py -v → all PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py", "src/kinoforge/core/reaper_actor.py", "src/kinoforge/core/sweeper.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/cli tests/core/test_reaper_actor.py tests/core/test_sweeper.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["5 callsites thread kwargs", "STALL_REAP refuses attach", "all touched suites green"]}
```

tasks.subject: C26 Task 12: RED live-smoke scaffolds (Phase A + Phase B) — commit BEFORE live spend
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Commit failing live-smoke scaffolds BEFORE Tasks 13/14 invoke live spend. CLAUDE.md durability rule.

**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.**

**Files:** Create tests/live/test_c26_phase_a_stall_detection_live.py, tests/live/test_c26_phase_b_wan_warm_reuse_live.py, tests/live/cfg_c26_phase_a.yaml, tests/live/cfg_c26_phase_b.yaml

**Acceptance Criteria:** both gated by KINOFORGE_LIVE_RUNPOD=1; both xfail until Tasks 13/14; Phase A cfg has tight window=60s + FakeEngine + sleep 240; Phase B cfg clones C25 Wan+ComfyUI + adds stall_* knobs; RED commit recorded.

**Verify:** SKIP without env var; xfail with env var.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/live/test_c26_phase_a_stall_detection_live.py", "tests/live/test_c26_phase_b_wan_warm_reuse_live.py", "tests/live/cfg_c26_phase_a.yaml", "tests/live/cfg_c26_phase_b.yaml"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/live/test_c26_phase_a_stall_detection_live.py tests/live/test_c26_phase_b_wan_warm_reuse_live.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["both gated", "both xfail until live tasks", "Phase A cfg tight window+FakeEngine", "Phase B cfg clones C25", "RED commit before live"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "gateScope": "task"}
```

tasks.subject: C26 Task 13: Phase A live smoke — FakeEngine intentional stall (~$0.05)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement Phase A body; run live; capture sidecar; demonstrate STALL_REAP end-to-end on cheap FakeEngine pod. Mitigates Risk R7.

**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.**

**Files:** Modify tests/live/test_c26_phase_a_stall_detection_live.py; Create tests/live/_c26_phase_a_smoke_evidence.json

**Acceptance Criteria:** live run on real RunPod; STALL_REAP fires within window + 2*hb_interval (=70s); sidecar with outcome=PROVEN + counter trail + pod_id; pod destroyed; spend ≤ $0.05; preflight green.

tasks.subject: C26 Task 14: Phase B live smoke — Wan + ComfyUI cold-skip OR PROVEN-PROTECTION (~$0.50)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement Phase B body; run live with C26 protections; outcome CLEAN-PASS or PROVEN-PROTECTION; closes C25 Task 4 deferred gate.

**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.**

**Files:** Modify tests/live/test_c26_phase_b_wan_warm_reuse_live.py; Create tests/live/_c26_phase_b_smoke_evidence.json

**Acceptance Criteria:** 2-CLI smoke via fresh subprocesses; CLEAN-PASS: gen2*1.43 <= gen1 + warm-attach log; PROVEN-PROTECTION: STALL_REAP fired + pod destroyed mid-gen1; FAIL guard on false-negative + false-positive; all pods destroyed; spend ≤ $0.55.

**Verify:** KINOFORGE_LIVE_RUNPOD=1 pixi run pytest tests/live/test_c26_phase_b_wan_warm_reuse_live.py -v -s → PASS

